nasb.text: They buried him in the city of David among the kings, because he had done well in Israel and to God and His house.

esv.text: And they buried him in the city of David among the kings, because he had done good in Israel, and toward God and his house.

cnv.text: 他和列王一同埋葬在大衛城裡，因為他在以色列為　神和　神的殿作了美善的事。

ccb.text: 民众把他葬在大卫城的王陵里，因为他在以色列为上帝和上帝的殿做了美善的事。
